ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED( Refer_to_Legal__c ), OR( ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) , 'Pending Recall - Client Request') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Client Request Sale') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Consumer Proposal') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Credit Counselling') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Bankruptcy') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Deceased') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Fraud') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Insurance') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Legal') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - PIF') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - SIF') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Paid Prior') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Paid Prior To Previous Agency') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Uncollectible') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - On Hold - Disputed') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Warehouse - Disputed') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Close - Disputed') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - On Hold - Counterclaim') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Warehouse - Counterclaim') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Close - Counterclaim') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Ready to Close') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Dormant Judgment') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - On Hold - Buy Back Pending Research') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Buy Back To Seller') , ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) ,'Pending Recall - Other') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: We cannot update Refer to Legal when Placement Main Status is Pending Recall
